reason: Domain glossary for Session, Resume, TUI, and Legacy TUI terms.
Accepted decision to delete legacy TUI, remove --mini, and preserve Resume only.
TUI render testing and frontend verification rules.
Current frontend crate boundaries for hya-tui and hya-tui-lib.
Backend CLI/session persistence and release workflow contracts.
Resume spans backend CLI, frontend CLI, client/runtime, and store boundaries.
Deletion/update requires searching all references and avoiding duplicate validation paths.
